name: analytics-plausible
description:
Plausible Analytics — privacy-friendly, cookieless. Alternative to analytics-umami.

Pricing trade-off vs Umami:
  • Plausible Cloud: $9/mo for 10k pageviews (no free tier; 30-day trial). Self-host: free (AGPL).
  • Umami Cloud: free 10k events/mo. Self-host: free (MIT).

Pick Plausible when: you want a more polished UI, willing to pay for hosted, OR plan to self-host on your own infra. Pick Umami when: you want free hosted, basic stats are enough.

No cookie banner needed (no PII collected). GDPR/CCPA-clean. Script <1KB. Mutually exclusive with analytics-umami — pick ONE.
